TestCase z50Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n2 > 0) {
        double* follow_case_b = (double*)malloc(t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
        if (follow_case_b != NULL) {
            memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n2 * sizeof(double));
            follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
        }
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n2 == 0
    if (follow_case.n2 <= 0) {
        // No elements in array b to process, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    int half = follow_case.n2 / 2;
    for (int i = half; i < follow_case.n2; i++) {
        follow_case.b[i] -= 5.0;
    }

    return follow_case;
}
